title: Crownelius/ventipus
summary: Terminal AI coding CLI for any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenRouter, OpenAI, NVIDIA, Ollama, LM Studio, DeepSeek). Modes, slash commands, multi-agent swarming, key-rotation pool, optional voice + screen-reader, sandbox + permission gates.

title: ID-Robots/clawbox
summary: 🦞 ClawBox — Your private AI assistant on NVIDIA Jetson. Setup wizard, dashboard, and 580+ skills. Plug in, scan QR, done.

title: JetBrains/koog
summary: Koog is a JVM (Java and Kotlin) framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

title: guyshonshon/amaco

title: antonio-amore-akiki/amore

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: Anastasia-front/linkedin-job-application-automation
summary: AI-Powered LinkedIn Job Application Automation System built with n8n  Automatically scrapes LinkedIn jobs (Apify + PhantomBuster), evaluates relevance using LLMs, generates personalized cover letters, stores applications in Google Sheets, and sends notifications to Telegram / Gmail.
